title: Day 28 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences: 

Sentence 1 - となりに　すわっても　いいですか。=　Can I seat beside you? 

Sentence 2 - ええ、　いいですよ。　どうぞ。= Yes, it's okay. Go ahead.

Sentence 3 - すこし　まどを　あけても　いいですか。= Can I open the window a little? 

Sentence 4 - すみません。　ちょっと…。= Sorry, I would rather not...

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
